Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course emphasizes '公民參與' (citizen participation) and '司法救濟' (judicial relief) in environmental decision-making, promoting inclusive processes as per Target 10.2 and 10.3.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is centered on law ('環評法'), legal systems ('法制'), judicial relief ('司法救濟'), and citizen participation ('公民參與'), directly supporting Targets 16.3, 16.6, and 16.7.
